case_title: JOSEPH DICK VS. FOGO DE CHAO INC

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,607.65 FILED BY DICK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA(CALIFORNIA)LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: CORRECTION OF NAMED DEFENDANTE AND AGENT FOR SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DICK, JOSEPH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DICK, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA(CALIFORNIA)LLC $4,027.65 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,132.65 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. FILED BY DICK, JOSEPH FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA(CALIFORNIA)LLC

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR JOSEPH DICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA(CALIFORNIA)LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANIEL BERTOLETE (GENERAL MANAGER). NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, JUDGMENT CREDITOR ASKS JUDGMENT DEBTOR FOR THE AMOUNT OF JUDGMENT PLUS FEES AND INTEREST. DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS AGREED AND MADE THE PAYMENT BY CHECK TO THE PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA(CALIFORNIA)LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DANIEL BORTOLETE, GENERAL MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA(CALIFORNIA)LLC
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,607.65 *CORRECETION OF NAMED FOR DEFENDANT* FILED BY DICK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA(CALIFORNIA)LLC
ORDER OF EXAMINATION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH DICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIEL BERTOLETE, GENERAL MANAGER.. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA(CALIFORNIA)LLC HEARING SET FOR OCT-10-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-10-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH DICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55) SERVED APR-01-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO CHURRASCARIA(CALIFORNIA)LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2022 - JUDGMENT.
